[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111111 6
1 00101001 3
2 00111011 5
3 11011111 7
4 00110011 4
5 01010000 2
6 00010000 1
7 00111011 5
